rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF HENRY NANG TOM
rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. The documents not on file despite the court's instruction to file them by 4/9/2024: (1) Inventory and Appraisal -partial 1 has been filed; however, no final Inventory and Appraisal is on file. (2) The personal representative shall file either petition for an order for final distribution of the estate or a report of status of administration in compliance with Prob. Code sec. 12200 PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE RICHARD P. GRANZELLA TRUST TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition To 1) Invalidate Amendment (Prob Code 6104 And 811); 2) Remove Trustee; 3) Return Trust Property Prob Code 850 And 859; 4) Attorneys Fees
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 05/01/2024 (no earlier date available), as the following issues (see tentative ruling for 03/19/2024 hearing) remain unaddressed: 1) Are all the beneficiaries listed in paragraph 16 of the petition adults? If any beneficiary is a minor, all persons (both parents if applicable) having legal custody of and residing with the minor must be identified by a verified allegation and must receive a separate copy of notice. CRC 7.51(d). 2) According to Exhibit F (trustee notification under Probate Code section 16061.7), the principal place of administration of the trust is located in San Mateo County. Should this petition have been filed in San Mateo County?

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE KATHERINE PAYNE-LOUDD REVOCABLE TRUST DATED APRIL 14, 2023
rulings.Calendar Matter: Verified Petition To: (1) Invalidate The Katherine Payne-Loudd Revocable Trust Dated April 14, 2023, (2) Impose Constructive Trust And For, (3)
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. Procedural Issues on Petition: (1) Petition to identify how/why The Regans and Cummins are entitled to the notice. (2) Notice of Directions for Remote Appearances and Access must be given. LRSF 14.1.C.6). (3) Proposed Order for Probate [DE-140] to be submitted. Local Rule 14.7.A Procedural Issues on Objection: (1) Proof of service of Objection to the parties. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.
